name: Lemon Mousse Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pie crust (9 inch), baked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
Filling
1 envelope unflavored gelatin
1/2 cup lemon juice
1/4 cup water
1 teaspoon lemon peel -- grated
8 drops yellow food coloring
8 ounces cream cheese
1 cup powdered sugar
2 cups whipped cream -- whipped
Combine the gelatin, lemon juice, and water in a bowl. Stir over medium heat until the gelatin is dissolved.
Stir in the lemon peel and food coloring. Set aside to cool slightly.
In another bowl, combine the cream cheese and powdered sugar until smooth.
Gradually add this mixture to the cooled gelatin mixture.
Mix in the whipped cream.
Spoon the filling into the prepared pie crust.
Refrigerate for 1 hour or until firm.
